sourceContext.originPage: Revlon product detail page - Super Lustrous Lipstick

suitableFor: product description sections with text and image side-by-side
product details/features with bulleted list and illustration
how-to-use instructions with step list and demonstration image
any split content layout with heading, text/list on one side, image on other
notSuitableFor: product hero sections with interactive elements
promotional content with CTAs and overlays
article hero sections with just title and image
